time. Update 12:36pm Rob McNicholas This work was completed around 11am. On Friday, July 5, from about noon to 2pm, we will be performing an OS upgrade for dhcp.eecs. During this time, DHCP service will be handled by our backup DHCP server, so there

n Wednesday, June 12th, the departmental DHCP server is scheduled for downtime from 10pm to 10:30pm (actual downtime is expected to be shorter than scheduled). [Read more…] about June IRIS Server Patching As noted following the January 4th Soda Hall

hing As noted following the January 4th Soda Hall power outage , an additional power outage for the second floor of Soda Hall is being scheduled to complete a circuit breaker replacement. Electrical power to the Soda Hall second floor will be down du

ower to the Soda Hall second floor will be down during much of the day on Thursday, June 13, 2024. Critical systems will be down from about 6am until perhaps 5pm. Of primary note is that the department NetApp fileservers will be down, so any systems

t NetApp fileservers will be down, so any systems that depend on HOME or PROJECT storage will be shutdown or nonfunctional. Services that will be unavailable during the maintenance period include: department webservice (including people.eecs, www2.ee

artment webservice (including people.eecs, www2.eecs and all other IRIS-hosted web sites), IRIS account & network forms, login servers (login.eecs, login-mfa.eecs, winterm.eecs), print server print.eecs, and outgoing SMTP server gateway.eecs. Any sys

cs, and outgoing SMTP server gateway.eecs. Any systems that remain powered-on but make use of HOME or PROJECT storage may become unresponsive during this time. Rebooting after maintenance is completed is usually recommended. Services that will remain

is usually recommended. Services that will remain online and available include: DHCP, EECS Active Directory, EECS LDAP, wired networking, DNS (cronus.eecs), and maillists (lists.eecs), and the main department website eecs.berkeley.edu. [Read more…]

epartment website eecs.berkeley.edu. [Read more…] about Soda Hall 2nd Floor Power Outage on June 13, 2024 Just before 6:30pm, the campus experienced a wide-spread power outage. Most of the east side of campus remains without power at the time of this

f campus remains without power at the time of this writing. There is currently no estimate for when power will be restored. IRIS services in Soda and Cory will be either shut down imminently, or will soon become unavailable, as UPS power is used up.

soon become unavailable, as UPS power is used up. Once power is safely restored to campus, we will work to bring services back online to the best of our abilities. [Read more…] about Unplanned East Campus Power Outage Tonight at 10PM we will be reboo

mpus Power Outage Tonight at 10PM we will be rebooting an access switch which provides network service to the basement and first floor of Cory Hall. All wireless networks and some wired networks on the first floor and basement will be unavailable for

e first floor and basement will be unavailable for a brief period. Update: This maintenance will no longer be required due to the power outage currently affecting Cory Hall. Beginning at about 3pm Friday, May 24, we will be upgrading the EECS Linux l

day, May 24, we will be upgrading the EECS Linux login servers login.eecs, login-mfa.eecs, and setsecretkey.eecs, from RedHat Enterprise Linux 7 to RHEL 8. During the upgrade process, the servers will be unavailable for general logins, and will be re

be unavailable for general logins, and will be rebooted multiple times. We anticipate that normal login service should be available by 9pm Friday evening. [Read more…] about Linux Login Server upgrades, Fri May 24 Due to planned electrical work, all

es, Fri May 24 Due to planned electrical work, all Cory Hall third floor wired and wireless networks will be offline during the early morning on Tuesday, May 21st. We expect the network to be unavailable beginning at 5AM, and all connectivity should

ble beginning at 5AM, and all connectivity should be restored by 10AM at the latest. Update 5/21 10:08: The electrical work took slightly longer than expected, but all networks should now be back online. Please email us at help@eecs.berkeley.edu if y
